title: If you could describe a character in a single sentence
display_title: If you could describe a character in a single sentence
wikitext:
[]: If you could describe a character in a single sentence....             Quote Post by CyberXIII » Thu Sep 10, 2009 8:26 pm which one, and what words would you use?

[]:             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Thu Sep 10, 2009 8:41 pm Shinji: Weak Asuka: Bitch Rei: Blank Toji: Jock Kensuke: Geek Hikari: Stubborn Gendo: Pimp Misato: Booze-hound Ritsuko: ? Maya: Lesbian Aoba: Cynacist Hyuga: Nerd

[]:             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Thu Sep 10, 2009 8:41 pm Well for the pilots, "What the $@%& is wrong with you?"

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Thu Sep 10, 2009 8:46 pm Rei: A diamond hidden in darkness, needing only light to show the world its brilliance.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Thu Sep 10, 2009 9:01 pm Rei: Just a small town girl living in a lonely world.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Thu Sep 10, 2009 9:08 pm Shinji: " Lost in a cold uncaring world he is unprepared to defend. " Asuka: Love starved ego driven, and totally unprepared for failure. Gendo father of the year, not! Miosato a hedgehog lovely with a dilemma, that tried to be a surogent momma. Rei: A lost angel, chained in the dark all alone.

[]:             Quote Post by Captain_Morgan » Thu Sep 10, 2009 9:45 pm Rei: She took a hike into the uncanny valley and found it to be so gosh darn nice there.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Thu Sep 10, 2009 10:30 pm Ornette: Bad ass asian who shreds guitar, drinks heavily, bangs tons of chicks, and is petty much the coolest dude to ever live. He is quite a character, after all.

[]:             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Thu Sep 10, 2009 10:41 pm Brown nose much Brik?

[]:             Quote Post by Bomby von Bombsville » Thu Sep 10, 2009 10:44 pm The entire cast: Lost in the whirlwind, '96 Bonnie & Clyde, Me & My Girlfriend, doin' 95 when we ride... ... ... wait, sorry, those ar 2Pac lyrics. Shinji: Elliott Smith without a guitar. Asuka: Way too hard on herself. Rei: Could really use a hug. Misato: Obfuscating simplicity in a drunken stupor to hide her pain. Gendo: Save the world by all means necessary.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Thu Sep 10, 2009 11:10 pm CHILDREN: Shinji Ikari: A child is forced to grow up too fast. Rei Ayanami: A girl slowly realizing she doesn't need to be who she's forced to be. Asuka Langley Soryu: A child taking on the mantel of adulthood, without being fully prepared. Toji Suzuhara: A boy trying to keep family ties alive. Hikari Horaki: A girl who pursues normality in a relationship at the most abnormal time ever. Kensuke Aida: The only boy in the series who still has the luxury of being a little boy, and yet tries to abandon all that to become an Eva pilot. Kaworu Nagisa: An Angel curious about the "Lillim". ADULTS: Gendo Ikari: A man attempting to bend a cruel world to his will. Yui Ikari: A woman who will not let man nor Angel stand between her and her son. Kozo Fuyutsuki: The only friend of Gendo. Keel Lorenz: Tries to better mankind in Evolution through 3rd Impact. Kyoko Zeppelin Soryu: Dismissed her human life to protect her daughter in Eva Unit 02. Naoko Akagi: Incompatible lover of Gendo #1. Ritsuko Akagi: Through an attempt to find happiness becomes incompatible lover of Gendo #2. Misato Katsuragi: A woman torn between images of her father. Ryoji Kaji: Knows too much for his own good. Makoto Hyuga: Secret and faithful admirer of Misato. Maya Ibuki: The best kind, knowledgeable and cute. Shigeru Aoba: The lonely rocker. PETS: Pen Pen: Misato's first faith in science (well, that and air conditioning). PLOT: (I can do it in seven words!) Shinji sets out to destroy the Angels.

[]:             Quote Post by Iam(not)toji » Thu Sep 10, 2009 11:18 pm Kaji- Melon farmer.

[]:             Quote Post by GAP » Thu Sep 10, 2009 11:30 pm Shinji: "A boy with a voice more annoying than Naruto's" Rei: "An expressionless girl who probably see into your soul." Asuka: "A Gainax redhead who is probably an example of why tsundere's are unbearable in real life." Misato: "Half Drunk, Half Competent and All Hottie." Toji: "A jock who should have been the main character of this show." Ritsuko "A scientist who got dumped by Gendo." Gendo: "A man who wanted Instumentality for a harem." Fuyutsuki: "A man should have killed Gendo when he had the chance." Kensuke: "A boy who wished that he was a gundam pilot." Hikari: "A girl who is completely innocent." Pen Pen: "A normal genetically engineered penguin or something more." Hyuga: "The other nerd in this show, he is worse than Kensuke." Maya: "The woman who wanted to sleep with Ritsuko but lost that chance to Gendo. That hasn't stopped her yet." Kaji: "A man of mystery, he probably slept with mor women than James Bond in any of his novels." Keel: "an old man with a God complex and more shrewd than Donald Trump." Kaworu: "A mysterious boy who is probably gay but probably not, who knows? Kaworu knows." Yui: "A woman who loves her son way too much." Mana: "A girl who sould be Shinji's girlfriend."

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Thu Sep 10, 2009 11:43 pm Mana: She leads the non cannon Harem.

[]:             Quote Post by Vegeta 20XX » Fri Sep 11, 2009 9:30 pm Vegeta 20XX - World Class Bluntmelon Dealer Ritsuko - fucking nuts, in both the nuts part and the fucking part. Shinji - I'd make fun of him, but I'm a puddle of orange liquid, so I'm in no place to talk. Asuka - Call Vegeta 20XX about how to properly use watermelons as weapons. Rei - Call Vegeta 20XX for great deals on Reiquarium sets. Misato - Has more beer than blood in her system.\ Naoko - Ritsuko, except already dead. Kaji - He can turn a straight woman horny and a straight man gay. Interestingly, he has no effect on gay men, else Kaworu would've put the gun down. Gendo - Not really a pimp, but plays one on TV. Toji - Comic relief until he dies. If you're Bender, then he's even funnier when he dies. Kensuke - The comic relief that should've died. Maya, Hyuuga, Aoba - Normal. Fucking normal. Kaworu - ambiguously straight. Yes, he's been misleading you this whole time. If you're reading this, then you know that this directly contradicts the statement about Kaji and how his manly charms are ineffective against gay men, and that if Kaworu isn't really gay, then he wouldn't have shot Kaji, so we have a paradox on our hands. DEAL WITH IT. Yui - HOT AS FUCK. I'd sell my soul, sell my left nut, kill my beloved cat, and jerk it in a fountain to fuck Yui. Those sexy hips, that lovely voice, that tight armor - I did mention that this is AFTER the contact experiment, right?

[]:             Quote Post by Adekis » Fri Sep 11, 2009 10:33 pm Shinji: A hero who fights to defend a world from Space Monsters and needs a therapist. Rei: She's just a small town girl, living in a lonely world. (Pizza-kun, you got this perfect.) Asuka: A hot-blooded super robot pilot who believes in herself and acts like a bitch. Misato: A woman who goes from happily single to mother of two, and has to put up with more drama than anyone else. GAP wrote: Toji: "A jock who should have been the main character of this show."

[]:             Quote Post by scarmullet » Fri Sep 11, 2009 11:17 pm Asuka: Every Rose has a thorn Shinji: Fuck you, Dad Rei: Meh

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Fri Sep 11, 2009 11:59 pm Naoko: She might have to choke a bitch. Shinji: "A boy with a voice more annoying than Naruto's"

[]:             Quote Post by Synapsid » Sat Sep 12, 2009 1:50 am "Everyone is sick, very sick" GAP wrote: Shinji: "A boy with a voice more annoying than Naruto's"

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sat Sep 12, 2009 10:54 am Asuka: Reminds me of my first Ex Girlfriend. Rei: Reminds me of my second Ex Girlfriend, if you add a touch of yandere in there. Misato: Possibly my next Ex Girlfriend? That or Mari. But a nice Hikari could be nice too. BrikHaus wrote: Ornette: Bad ass asian who shreds guitar, drinks heavily, bangs tons of chicks, and is petty much the coolest dude to ever live.
